title: heko #2240
definition:
1) to have come, have arrived, be present
 2) metaph.
    2a) to come to one, i.e. to seek an intimacy with one, become
        his follower: to come upon one (unexpectedly)
    2b) to come upon one, of things endured
nasbUsage:

 2) metaph.
